title: UK Net Zero Research and Innovation Framework Delivery Plan: progress report 2022 to 2025
body: "The UK Net Zero Research and Innovation Framework, published in 2021, set out the research and development challenges across the UK over the next 5 to 10 years.   The corresponding UK Net Zero Research and Innovation Framework: Delivery Plan 2022 to 2025, published in 2023, set out how government and Ofgem would invest over £4 billion in research and innovation between 2022 and 2025 to help develop the next generation of net zero technologies and solutions to address the challenges set out in the Framework and to support innovative UK businesses to benefit from the growing green economy.  This Progress Report provides an overview of the progress of these programmes and features case studies of how this investment is delivering tangible results in support of the UK’s Clean Energy Superpower Mission. "
